visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women sit at a white table in a bright, modern indoor space. Woman A in a blue top works on a gray laptop while Woman B in a white blouse looks over. The background is minimalist with white shelves, green plants, and blue-and-white balloons. (2) Woman B picks up a smartphone from the table and starts scrolling. She points at the screen while talking. Woman A reacts with a startled and slightly annoyed facial expression, leaning over and gesturing towards the phone with her hands. (3) Close-up shots feature the La Roche-Posay Hyalu B5 Serum bottle and its packaging. Clear liquid is dispensed from a dropper onto a hand and then massaged into the skin of the face. The lighting is bright and studio-quality. (4) A split-screen comparison shows skin textures labeled 'Before' and 'After' with visible reduction in fine lines. A female professional in a white lab coat appears in a consultation room, pointing at a tablet screen showing digital skin analysis. (5) Promotional graphics appear showing a pink Disney Princess umbrella and an Aurora phone grip as free gifts. The two women interact playfully again at the table, with Woman A holding the blue serum bottle and Woman B holding the phone.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 手機借我一下. (2) [Subtitle]: 好啊. (3) [Subtitle]: 我滑個相簿喔. (4) [Subtitle]: 好啊. (5) [Subtitle]: 我滑個GPT喔. (6) [Variety]: 欸不行. (7) [Subtitle]: 為什麼我要看你GPT. [Logo]: LA ROCHE-POSAY. [Slogan]: 全新 B5 小藍瓶. (8) [Slogan]: 無針水光科技 「修復型玻尿酸」. (9) [Slogan]: 實證深導 逼近真皮層. (10) [Slogan]: 滲透力超強 / 高3倍. (11) [Subtitle]: 使用前 / 使用後. [Slogan]: 實證 81% 深層紋淡化. (12) [Slogan]: 細紋肉眼可見明顯變淡. (13) [Slogan]: 無痛體驗水光針的效果 還不用忍受恢復期!!. (14) [Slogan]: 全新 B5 膠原霜. [Slogan]: 1小時激活膠原. (15) [Slogan]: MOMO獨家!! [Slogan]: 消費滿$1888 贈迪士尼公主手機支架. [Slogan]: 消費滿$3000 贈迪士尼摺疊傘. (16) [Subtitle]: 欸不要偷看我GPT啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the skit, 1 female doctor/professional in the middle section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Woman A has long dark hair and wears a light blue sleeveless pleated top. Woman B has reddish-brown wavy hair and wears a white button-up blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright living room with white walls, a white bookshelf, potted plants, and decorative blue/white balloons. Later, a professional medical/consultation office with skin charts and specialized analysis equipment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice asks a rapid question, met by a casual response. Light, upbeat acoustic guitar and a steady drum beat begin playing in the background. The audio has a bright, commercial-grade spectral balance. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of a specific app. The female speaker's voice becomes more animated and energetic with higher pitch variability. The background music maintains its cheerful, major-key tempo. (3) A professional narrator's voice-over begins, explaining the product benefits with high articulation clarity. Multiple 'whoosh' transition sound effects are heard between edits. The acoustic music bed continues steadily underneath the primary narration. (4) Small 'sparkle' or high-frequency percussion sound effects punctuate the delivery of scientific facts and skin percentages. A second authoritative female voice (the doctor) speaks calmly and professionally. Music volume remains slightly ducked under the speech. (5) The original two female voices return for a playful closing dialogue. Their speech is fast-paced with frequent laughter. More digital UI sound effects are layered over the promotion details. The music ends with a quick hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comedic Conflict -> Product Intro -> Benefit Evidence -> Promotion Details -> Closing Skit
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote La Roche-Posay Hyalu B5 Serum and Cream by combining a relatable social skit about friend interactions with scientific skin analysis and limited-time promotional offers on MOMO.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, mention of specific brand benefits, presence of a medical professional, and a detailed call-to-action with promotional prices and free gifts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video cleverly uses a 'checking friend's GPT' comedic trope to segue into a heavy information-dense skincare promotion, maintaining high viewer engagement through fast pacing and high-quality studio production.
